text:
Active Diagnoses: Viral Hepatitis Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had an active diagnosis of viral hepatitis (e.g., Hepatitis A, B, C, D and E) in the last seven days. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
288 I2500_WND_INFCTN_CD I2500_WND_INFCTN_CD I2500 Wound Infection Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had an active diagnosis of a wound infection (other than foot) in the last seven days. -=Not
